query:
-- Step 2: Tag Unknown services with clear SasBoss/SmileTel billing plan name patterns
-- These are services from the SmileTel/SasBoss billing system for customers not yet in the SasBoss workbook
UPDATE services
SET
  provider = 'SasBoss',
  supplierName = 'SasBoss',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE provider = 'Unknown'
  AND (
    -- SIP trunk patterns (SmileTel/SasBoss billing descriptions)
    planName LIKE '%# Rental%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Channels Business SIP%'
    OR planName LIKE '%eFax%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Mobile Calls%'
    OR planName LIKE '%National Calls%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Miscellaneous Calls%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
    OR planName LIKE '%4G Backup%'
    OR planName LIKE '%100 Number block%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Call Forward%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Teams Voice%'
    OR planName LIKE '%NBN%Unlimited%'
    -- SasBoss product names
    OR planName IN (
      'Single Number', 'Standard', 'Voicemail', 'Regional', 'Premium', '13Number',
      'Local', 'Hunt Group Premium', 'National', 'Collaboration', 'Basic',
      'Auto Attendant Basic', 'Mobile', 'Other', 'Voice - Direct In Dial Numbers',
      'Voice - Services', 'Voice - Telephone Usage', 'Voice - Line Rental',
      'Data - Internet'
    )
    -- Exclude services that are clearly from other carriers
    AND planName NOT LIKE '%AAPT%'
    AND planName NOT LIKE '%Infinet%'
    AND planName NOT LIKE '%Starlink%'
    AND planName NOT LIKE '%Vocus%'
    AND planName NOT LIKE '%Aussie Broadband%'
    AND planName NOT LIKE '%Smile Tel NBN%'
    AND planName NOT LIKE '%Fibre 400%'
  );
